---
title: Verrière du Jardin des Plantes, Paris
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784733523/jardindesplantes_xt5hbm.png
description: Verrière du Jardin des Plantes, Paris
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2021-06-27
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784733523/jardindesplantes_xt5hbm.png)
